sqlMap.insert: MERGE INTO settlement_daily (seller_name, settle_day, gross_amount, commission, payout, reg_date) KEY (seller_name, settle_day) SELECT p.seller_name, o.order_date AS settle_day, SUM(oi.qty * oi.unit_price) AS gross_amount, SUM( (oi.qty * oi.unit_price) * CASE p.category WHEN 'ELECTRONICS' THEN 12 WHEN 'ACCESSORY' THEN 8 WHEN 'HOME' THEN 10 WHEN 'FASHION' THEN 15 WHEN 'SPORTS' THEN 10 WHEN 'BOOKS' THEN 5 ELSE 10 END / 100 ) AS commission, SUM( (oi.qty * oi.unit_price) - (oi.qty * oi.unit_price) * CASE p.category WHEN 'ELECTRONICS' THEN 12 WHEN 'ACCESSORY' THEN 8 WHEN 'HOME' THEN 10 WHEN 'FASHION' THEN 15 WHEN 'SPORTS' THEN 10 WHEN 'BOOKS' THEN 5 ELSE 10 END / 100 ) AS payout, #regDate# AS reg_date FROM order_item oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN product_option po ON oi.option_id = po.option_id JOIN product p ON po.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.status = 2 GROUP BY p.seller_name, o.order_date
sqlMap.select: SELECT seller_name, settle_day, gross_amount, commission, payout, reg_date FROM settlement_daily ORDER BY settle_day DESC, seller_name
sqlMap.insert: MERGE INTO summary_daily (summary_day, seller_count, gross_amount, payout_amount, reg_date) KEY (summary_day) SELECT sd.settle_day, COUNT(DISTINCT sd.seller_name), SUM(sd.gross_amount), SUM(sd.payout), #regDate# FROM settlement_daily sd GROUP BY sd.settle_day
